column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND
Concrete with GRAVEL, COBBLES and BOULDERS of moderately decomposed granite with some brown, silty SAND. (FILL)
Angular GRAVEL, COBBLES and BOULDERS of moderately decomposed granite with some brown, silty SAND and some red bricks. (FILL)
Sub-rounded GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite with some brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained, kaolin and chlorite coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-30 degrees.
